task: Look for reviews of a Nest Hello Video Doorbell and filter by 1-star ratings.
graderReasoning: The agent ultimately completed the task on Google Shopping. Evidence shows it returned to the Google Shopping results page for “Google Nest Hello Wi‑Fi Video Doorbell,” clicked the star-rating widget on the product card, which opened the product dialog with a visible User reviews section. In that dialog, the snapshot shows a reviews filter combobox initially labeled “All reviews” with options including “1 star” (refs e479/e481). The agent then clicked the “1 star” option, and the subsequent snapshot shows the combobox changed to “1 star” [ref=e487], with 1-star review entries visible below (e.g. multiple reviews labeled “Rated 1.0 out of 5”). This satisfies looking for reviews of the Nest Hello Video Doorbell and filtering by 1-star ratings on Google Shopping.
final_result_response:
Done. I clicked the “Rated 4.8 out of 5, 33K user reviews” rating in the Google Shopping product panel, which opened the User reviews section, then selected “1 star” from the reviews dropdown.

The panel is now filtered to 1-star reviews.
action_history: Opening Google Shopping: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.google.com/shopping?udm=28');
Searching for Nest Hello Video Doorbell: await page.locator('e3').fill('Nest Hello Video Doorbell');
Searching for Nest Hello Video Doorbell: await page.locator('e7').click();
Opening Nest Hello product details: await page.locator('e321').click();
Opening product viewer: await page.locator('e406').click();
Applying the review filter: await page.locator('e135').click();
Opening filtered Nest Hello product details: await page.locator('e316').click();
Opening product viewer link: await page.locator('e401').click();
Opening Google product detail page: const p2 = await openTab('https://www.google.com/shopping/product/14571768327075259565?q=Nest+Hello+Video+Doorbell&udm=28');
Searching legacy Google Shopping: const p3 = await openTab('https://www.google.com/search?tbm=shop&q=Google+Nest+Hello+Wi-Fi+Video+Doorbell');
Opening Walmart reviews for Nest Hello: const p4 = await openTab('https://www.walmart.com/reviews/product/381881630');
Filtering Walmart reviews by 1 star: await page.locator('e24').click();
Opening the Nest Hello product panel on Google Shopping: await page.locator('e285').click();
Opening product viewer: await page.locator('e370').click();
Closing the product panel to try the rating widget: await page.locator('e374').click();
Clearing product panels: await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
Clearing product panels: await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
Clearing product panels: await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
Clicking the Google Shopping star rating directly: await page.getByRole('img', {name:/Rated 4\.8 out of 5.*33K/i}).first().click();
Opening the reviews filter dropdown: await page.locator('e408').click();
Selecting the 1-star review filter: await page.locator('e481').click();
